name: American CuMo Mining Corporation
summary: American CuMo Mining Corporation, a mineral exploration and development company, engages in identifying, acquiring, and developing natural resource opportunities in the United States and Canada. The company explores for molybdenum, copper, and silver deposits. Its flagship property is the CuMo molybdenum project located in Idaho. The company was formerly known as Mosquito Consolidated Gold Mines Limited and changed its name to American CuMo Mining Corporation in January 2013. The company was incorporated in 1971 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
